$comment: FC7 C1a+C1b (D-FC7-STRUCT-BY-VALUE-ARG-RETURN): x86_64 SysV struct-by-value across all three classes — two()=8B in ONE register, three()=12B in TWO registers (C1b multi-register, rdi:rsi), big()=24B BY REFERENCE (>16B MEMORY). Far fields t.z@8 (2nd eightbyte) + b.c@16 survive. (3+4)+(5+6+7)+(8+9+0)=42 via non-inlined mk(). SysV runtime = x86_64-ELF only (Win64/AAPCS64 fail loud, C2/C3; Mach-O-x86_64 SysV has no CI leg).
